title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays homage to all the great leaders of the Dandi Satyagraha
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays homage to all the great leaders of the Dandi Satyagraha

On this very day in 1930, Dandi Satyagraha started by Mahatma Gandhi further intensified the desire for freedom within every age and class
It was such a step taken towards Swadeshi that changed the direction of the independence movement

Posted On:
12 MAR 2026 2:40PM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah today paid homage to all the great leaders of the Dandi Satyagraha.

In a post on X, Union Home Minister Shri Amit Shah said, “On this very day in 1930 AD, Mahatma Gandhi ji initiated the Dandi Satyagraha, which further intensified the desire for freedom within every age and class. It was such a step taken towards Swadeshi that changed the direction of the independence movement. I pay homage to all the great souls of the Dandi Satyagraha.”

1930 ई. में आज ही के दिन महात्मा गांधी जी ने दांडी सत्याग्रह शुरू किया था, जिसने हर आयु, वर्ग के भीतर स्वतंत्रता की इच्छा को और भी प्रबल बनाया। यह स्वदेशी की दिशा में उठाया गया ऐसा कदम था, जिसने स्वाधीनता आंदोलन की दिशा बदल दी।
दांडी सत्याग्रह के सभी महापुरुषों को नमन करता हूँ।
pic.twitter.com/ejmUJSYEHH
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
March 12, 2026

 ****

RK/RR/PR/PS

(Release ID: 2238824)
